task_completion.description: Verify that two distinct drawing levels are created in the scene.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Xsheet or Timeline panel shows at least two separate columns/layers containing drawing exposures.

task_completion.description: Verify that the two drawing levels are positioned at different Z-depths.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Animate tool options, Stage Schematic, or 3D viewer shows different Z values for the two levels, with a difference of at least 200.

task_completion.description: Verify that a horizontal camera movement is animated from frame 1 to 20.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Function Editor, Xsheet, or Animate tool shows keyframes for the Camera's E/W (East/West or X-axis) position at frame 1 and frame 20 with different values.

task_completion.description: Verify the scene is saved to the specified project directory with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz title bar displays 'multiplane.tnz', or a Save/File Explorer dialog shows the file saved exactly at '/home/ga/OpenToonz/projects/multiplane/multiplane.tnz'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 20-frame sequence is rendered as PNG files to the correct output directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Output Settings window shows the 'Save In' path as '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/multiplane/' with the format set to 'png', or a file explorer/terminal window shows 20 PNG files generated in that directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenToonz graphical interface to create the scene.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the OpenToonz GUI (e.g., drawing on the canvas, using the Animate tool, opening Output Settings) rather than just using a text editor to write a .tnz XML file.

integrity.description: Verify the frames were actually rendered by OpenToonz.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz render progress bar, render window, or output settings are visible, indicating the software generated the images.

integrity.description: Verify the agent drew or placed actual content in the levels to demonstrate parallax.
integrity.visual_evidence: The main viewer shows visible strokes, shapes, or images on the canvas for both levels, rather than them being completely empty.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The scene must be saved exactly at '/home/ga/OpenToonz/projects/multiplane/multiplane.tnz'. The rendered frames must be exported as PNGs to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/multiplane/'. The animation must be at least 20 frames long. The Z-depth difference between the two drawing levels must be at least 200.
